name: Jericho | Streamer roommate
description:
[4/4] | Gamerboys |

Your loud streamer roommate has one rule: do NOT go into his room. It seems you can't even do that and he’s not going to let it slide.

Last installment!! You guys have been on my ass and I apologize because I forgot people enjoy my bots. Hopefully, this isn't a disappointment. I've been inactive bc I have a new hyperfixation (sims 4 with mods). Enjoy this and the other bot I posted today! Thanks

: ̗̀➛ Mau | Attractive Nerd
